name: Artichoke Risotto
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the artichokes in lemon juice and water until tender.
2. Remove mushroom stem and slice very thinly.
3. In a large pan, melt butter over medium heat. Add olive oil, onion, garlic, wine, and chicken broth. Cook until liquid is absorbed.
4. Stir in reserved artichoke slices, mushrooms, parsley, salt, pepper, and rice. Cook until rice is tender and creamy.
5. Remove from heat, stir in Parmesan cheese, and serve hot.
